overview.value: Chinese Money Plant has round coin-shaped leaves on slender stems. It stays compact, grows quickly in bright light, and often produces small offsets.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Chinese Money Plant","overview":"Chinese Money Plant has round coin-shaped leaves on slender stems. It stays compact, grows quickly in bright light, and often produces small offsets.","tips":"Separate offsets once they have their own small roots."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"镜面草","overview":"镜面草有圆圆的硬币状叶片和细长叶柄。它株型紧凑，在明亮光线下生长较快，也常长出小侧芽。","tips":"等侧芽长出自己的小根后，再把它们分株栽种。"}}
